failure_modes.cause: Loss of heat removal capacity in 14.72m coil at 120°C with concentrated reactants
failure_modes.mitigation: Install distributed temperature monitoring every 2m of coil length

failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG eutectic mixture solidifies below 66°C during startup/shutdown
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heated purge protocol and maintain minimum 80°C throughout system

failure_modes.cause: Rapid volume expansion when cold quench contacts 120°C reaction stream
failure_modes.mitigation: Pre-heat quench stream to 80°C and use controlled injection rate

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow and causes pressure buildup in heated coil
validation_experiments: Run thermal stability test: hold DES at 130°C for 2 hours, monitor for decomposition
Test startup protocol: pump cold DES through heated coil, measure pressure drop vs temperature
Quench compatibility: inject room temperature quench into hot DES stream, monitor pressure transients
